title: Chocolate > Vanilla+
description: Its better than vanilla, so it must be a chocolate flavoured modpack.
body:
## **Because vanilla is nice, but chocolate is better.**

Transform your Minecraft experience from plain vanilla to rich, indulgent chocolate with this carefully curated modpack. We've taken everything you love about vanilla Minecraft and enhanced it with the perfect blend of quality-of-life improvements, stunning visual upgrades, and essential server-friendly features.

### What's in the mix:
**Visual & Performance enhancements**
- Sodium, 
- Iris Shaders, 
- Dynamic FPS,
- Ambient Environment

**World Generation & Exploration**
 
- Discover breathtaking landscapes with Terralith, Biomes O’ Plenty, and Nullscape. 
- Explore ruins, temples, and dungeons from AdventureZ, Towers of the Wild, and more.



No game-breaking changes, no overwhelming complexity - just pure enhancement that makes Minecraft more beautiful, more convenient, and more enjoyable to play with friends.
**Designed specifically for my server** - optimized for multiplayer performance and community gameplay.

Vanilla+ done right. Because sometimes the best improvements are the ones that feel like they should have always been there.
